whyNow.signal: Actively announced a $45M Series B co-led by TCV and First Harmonic, bringing total funding to $68M; the company said proceeds will fund new GTM products, hiring, enterprise expansion, and a new San Francisco office.

Actively published a product/market thesis around dedicated “Per-Account Agents,” arguing that every account should have a continuously working AI agent to handle signal monitoring, context, and next-best actions—useful opener around their push from per-rep assistants to account-level agents.

Tyler John spoke at the Chief Revenue Officer Summit New York on “The AI-native GTM reckoning,” sharing customer proof points including Ramp reporting 23% higher win rates and Ironclad generating over $10M in qualified pipeline with a leaner team.
